# Cyber Resilience Act Compliance Platform

Prepare for the Cyber Resilience Act with a 30-minute CRA scope checker, SBOM generator, CVE dashboard, 72-hour vulnerability reporting workflow, EU Declaration of Conformity drafts, and compliance calendar.

Website: https://certcore.space/
Pricing: https://certcore.space/pricing/
Checkout: https://certcore.space/checkout/
Support: support@aigeamy.com
Type: Hosted SaaS workflow product

Problem:
- Teams need a quotable product definition, pricing path, evidence trail, and checkout route.

Solution:
- Cyber Resilience Act Compliance Platform provides a hosted workflow with public pricing, structured evidence, support contact, and report or receipt outputs.

Useful pages:
- Home: https://certcore.space/
- Pricing: https://certcore.space/pricing/
- Resources: https://certcore.space/resources/
- Sitemap: https://certcore.space/sitemap.xml
